name: Aggressive
description: This enemy intends to Attack Xfor X damageX.

name: Empower
description: This enemy intends to use a Buff.

name: Malicious
description: This enemy intends to apply Afflictions on your cards.

name: Death Blow
description: This creature is trying to take you down with it. It will attack you for X damage before being destroyed.

name: Strategic
description: This enemy intends to apply a Debuff to you.

name: Strategic
description: This enemy intends to apply a powerful Debuff to you.

name: Defensive
description: This enemy intends to Block on its turn.

name: Sleeping
description: This enemy is doing nothing this turn.

name: Strategic
description: This enemy intends to give you X Status cards.

name: Stunned
description: This enemy can't act on its next turn.

name: Summon
description: This enemy intends to summon Monsters.
